Startup Compass

System Configuration & Testing

Manage environment variables, API keys, and test connections

API Keys Management
Manage and test API keys for external services.
API Key Security Guidelines
  • Never expose API keys in frontend code or client-side variables.
  • Use environment variables for all sensitive keys (backend scope).
  • Rotate keys regularly and monitor usage for security.
  • Set usage limits and alerts for cost control.
  • Use separate keys for development, staging, and production.
